description: Bible Skills Library — reusable AI engineering skills organized by tech stack

categories.react: React patterns, naming, state management, code style
categories.antd-v6: Ant Design v6 component patterns and theming
categories.supabase: Supabase schema, SDK, auth, migrations, edge functions

skills.name: bible-project-structure
skills.description: Monorepo root skeleton — where top-level directories live

skills.name: bible-react-naming
skills.description: All naming conventions: pages, components, hooks, stores, routes, utilities

skills.name: bible-react-provider-context
skills.description: Provider Context pattern with class State + useReducer

skills.name: bible-react-code-style
skills.description: Concise arrows, inline handlers, eslint-disable prohibition

skills.name: bible-react-hotkeys
skills.description: Keyboard shortcut patterns with react-hotkeys-hook

skills.name: bible-antd-components
skills.description: ANTD v6 theme tokens, feedback, icons, component tokens, migration

skills.name: bible-tanstack-query-mutation
skills.description: TanStack Query hooks (useQ_*) and mutation hooks (useM_*)

skills.name: bible-tanstack-store
skills.description: TanStack Store for global state with granular selectors

skills.name: bible-tanstack-router
skills.description: File-based routing, guards, layout routes, navigation

skills.name: bible-supabase-rls-policies
skills.description: Row Level Security: denormalized org_id, single-hop policies, BEFORE INSERT triggers

skills.name: bible-supabase-schema
skills.description: Schema design: IDs, naming, FKs, junction tables, enums, JSONB

skills.name: bible-supabase-migrations
skills.description: Migration workflow, templates, common operations, type generation

skills.name: bible-supabase-edge-functions
skills.description: Deno edge functions: naming, structure, CORS, shared utilities

skills.name: bible-supabase-cli
skills.description: Supabase CLI commands, psql access, debugging

skills.name: bible-supabase-auth
skills.description: Authentication patterns: session, guards, membership, sign out

skills.name: bible-supabase-sdk
skills.description: sb_* naming convention for all Supabase SDK operations

skills.name: bible-supabase-options
skills.description: Co-located enum options with const_{Table}{Column}Options naming

skills.name: bible-env-variables
skills.description: Centralized ENVs utility with zero direct import.meta.env access

skills.name: bible-skill-extension
skills.description: Convention for extending Bible skills without modifying them

skills.name: bible-authoring
skills.description: Guidelines for writing Bible-ready skills
